title: Rieul (hangul)
summary: Rieul (letter: ㄹ; name: 리을) is a consonant of the Korean alphabet. Rieul is pronounced [ɾ] at the beginning of a syllable and [l] at the end of a syllable. For example: 러시아 reosia ('Russia'), 별 byeol ('star').
text:
Rieul (letter: ㄹ; name: 리을) is a consonant of the Korean alphabet. Rieul is pronounced [ɾ] at the beginning of a syllable and [l] at the end of a syllable. For example: 러시아 reosia ('Russia'), 별 byeol ('star').
